Admin Dashboard

Operations command center

Admin rules and customer controls

Admins manage onboarding, customer status, transaction review, risk flags, and audit controls. Customer banking remains separate.

Admin responsibilities

  • Approve or reject accounts.

    Customer enrollment can be opened by users, but final activation belongs to admin review.

  • Monitor transfers.

    Admins review unusual payments and freeze customer movement when risk rules trigger.

  • Maintain audit evidence.

    Admin decisions, status changes, and security actions must be traceable.
